name: Kao Fong Machinery Co., Ltd
summary: Kao Fong Machinery Co., Ltd operates in the mold processing industry in Taiwan and internationally. It offers double column, vertical, horizontal, high speed double column, moving cross rail double column, and gantry machining centers, as well as drilling and tapping machining centers. The company was formerly known as Kao Fong Iron Factory and changed its name to Kao Fong Machinery Co., Ltd. in 1972. Kao Fong Machinery Co., Ltd was founded in 1968 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan. Kao Fong Machinery Co., Ltd is a subsidiary of Hota Industrial Mfg. Co., Ltd.
